overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link climbing a snowy mountain at night. The character ascends from a narrow rocky canyon path to an open snow-covered peak, eventually approaching a small frost plant on the summit ridge.

events.description: camera pulls back to higher angle revealing more of the mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the narrow rocky path between steep stone walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock face forming the left boundary of the path
steep dark rock face forming the right boundary of the path
narrow gravel and stone trail winding upward
snow-capped summit visible against the starry sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow rocky canyon path at night, flanked by steep stone walls. The camera follows closely from behind as the character climbs toward a distant snow-covered peak visible against the starry sky.

events.description: character reaches the snow line and transitions from rocky terrain to snow-covered peak

agents.ego_description: walking up the snowy slope toward the mountain peak under starlight

entered.detail: smooth white snow surface covering the mountain peak
dark silhouettes of distant peaks against the night sky
deep valley visible to the right of the ridge

segments.scene_description: Breaking out of the rocky canyon, the scene opens onto a wide snow-covered summit under a vast starry sky. The character continues ascending the snowy ridge with distant mountain ranges visible on the horizon.

events.description: small white frost plant becomes visible on the snow ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining a small white frost plant sitting on the snow

notable_agents.action: small white frost plant sitting stationary on the snow

entered.detail: small white crystalline plant or flower standing on the snow
jagged rocky outcrop visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the snowy ridge, the character approaches a small white frost plant sitting on the snow. The vast mountain landscape stretches out in all directions under the night sky as the character examines the plant before continuing past it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a confined rocky canyon into a vast, open snowy summit under a starry night sky. It begins with the camera following closely behind the character as they climb a narrow path flanked by steep stone walls, keeping a distant snow-covered peak in view. As the character breaks out of the canyon, the scene opens onto a wide, frozen ridge where the horizon expands to reveal distant mountain ranges beneath the stars. The camera then tracks the character along this snowy crest before turning toward a small white frost plant resting in the snow. Finally, the view encompasses the immense mountain landscape in all directions as the character examines the plant and continues their journey across the peak.
